data.name: taxi_fleet_state
data.description: Current state of the taxi fleet including all taxis' positions, states, and metrics. Use this to understand the current fleet situation and identify available taxis for dispatch or repositioning.

structure.pickup_count: int - Number of taxis en route to pick up passengers
structure.occupied_count: int - Number of taxis currently carrying passengers
structure.idle_taxis: list[str] - List of idle taxi IDs
structure.pickup_taxis: list[str] - List of pickup taxi IDs
structure.occupied_taxis: list[str] - List of occupied taxi IDs

taxi_id.cumulative_income: float - Cumulative income proxy for fairness (cross-checkpoint)
taxi_id.recent_order_count: int - Number of recent dispatches in rolling window

data.usage_example:
```python
# Check fleet utilization
fleet = taxi_fleet_state
print(f"Fleet size: {fleet['fleet_size']}")
print(f"Idle: {fleet['idle_count']}, Pickup: {fleet['pickup_count']}, Occupied: {fleet['occupied_count']}")

# Get available taxis for dispatch
idle_taxis = fleet['idle_taxis']
for taxi_id in idle_taxis[:5]:
    details = fleet['taxi_details'][taxi_id]
    print(f"Taxi {taxi_id} at edge {details['current_edge']}")
```

data.name: pending_reservations
data.description: List of pending taxi reservations (waiting passengers). Use this to identify passengers who need to be picked up and assign taxis to them.

reservations.state: int - SUMO reservation state code (e.g., 1=new, 4=assigned, 8=picked up)
reservations.person_ids: list[str] - Person IDs in this reservation
reservations.pickup_position: Optional [float, float] - Person pickup (x, y) position (when available)
reservations.pickup_road_id: Optional str - Person road ID at pickup (when available)

data.usage_example:
```python
# Check pending reservations
reservations = pending_reservations
print(f"Waiting passengers: {reservations['pending_count']}")

for res in reservations['reservations'][:10]:
    print(f"Reservation {res['id']}: from {res['from_edge']} to {res['to_edge']}")
```

data.name: current_taxi_config
data.description: **PRE-DEFINED VARIABLE (dict)**: Current taxi scheduling configuration. Use this to understand the current dispatch and repositioning settings. Use directly: `current_taxi_config`, NOT `current_taxi_config()`.

structure.fallback_to_greedy_dispatch: bool - If dispatch_strategy=='llm' and no dispatch_decisions, use greedy online fill
structure.greedy_distance_tie_threshold: float - Distance margin (m) to treat taxis as near-equal candidates
structure.greedy_score_weights: dict - {'distance': float, 'income': float, 'recent_orders': float} (lower is better)
structure.online_dispatch_cost_weights: dict - {'eta': float, 'income': float, 'recent_orders': float} (normalized per reservation, lower is better)
structure.online_dispatch_candidate_k: int - Max candidate taxis per reservation for ETA scoring
structure.online_dispatch_max_reservations: int - Max reservations to consider per control cycle
structure.online_dispatch_assumed_speed_mps: float - Fallback speed when route ETA is unavailable
structure.recent_order_window_seconds: float - Rolling window for recent_order_count fairness
structure.fare_base: float - Base fare (income proxy, added at dropoff)
structure.fare_per_second: float - Fare rate per second of travel (income proxy, added at dropoff)
structure.dispatch_retry_max_seconds: float - Drop queued dispatch after this age (s)
structure.dispatch_retry_max_attempts: int - Drop queued dispatch after this many attempts
structure.reposition_decisions: Optional list[dict] - Reposition overrides: [{'taxi_id': str, 'target_edge': str}|{'taxi_id': str, 'target_taz': str}]
structure.fallback_to_auto_reposition: bool - If reposition_strategy=='llm' and no reposition_decisions, use auto reposition
structure.reposition_interval_seconds: int - How often to check for repositioning (seconds)
structure.min_idle_taxis_ratio: float - Minimum ratio of idle taxis (0.0-1.0)
structure.auto_reposition_max_ratio: float - Fraction of idle taxis to reposition per cycle
structure.auto_reposition_critical_only: bool - Only target TAZs with demand>0 and supply==0
structure.auto_reposition_top_taz: int - When not critical_only, pick top-N demand/supply zones
structure.high_demand_zones: list[str] - Edge IDs of high-demand zones

data.usage_example:
```python
# Switch to online dispatch + auto reposition (recommended)
policy = current_taxi_config.copy()
policy.update({
    'dispatch_strategy': 'online_eta',
    'online_dispatch_cost_weights': {'eta': 0.8, 'income': 0.1, 'recent_orders': 0.1},
    'reposition_strategy': 'auto_taz_balance',
    'auto_reposition_max_ratio': 0.05,
})
config = {"taxi_scheduling": policy}
```

data.name: taz_stats
data.description: Current Traffic Analysis Zone (TAZ) statistics including demand, matching rate, and supply. Use this to identify high-demand/low-supply zones for repositioning.

taz_id.demand: int - Number of pending reservations originating in this TAZ
taz_id.supply: int - Number of idle taxis currently in this TAZ
taz_id.total_taxis: int - Total number of taxis in this TAZ
taz_id.incoming_supply: int - Number of taxis currently moving to this TAZ

functions.name: read_taxi_traffic_states
functions.description: Query historical taxi traffic states. Returns a DICT with keys: 'snapshots', 'total_snapshots', 'filtered_snapshots'. Check for 'error' key first. Use data.get('snapshots', []) for safe access. Automatically uses the most recent traffic states file.

input_format.start_time: Optional start time filter in seconds (float, default: None)
input_format.end_time: Optional end time filter in seconds (float, default: None)
input_format.exact_time: Optional exact time filter in seconds (float, default: None)
input_format.max_snapshots: Optional maximum number of snapshots to read (int, default: None)

functions.name: dispatch_taxi
functions.description: Build a dispatch override decision entry for taxi scheduling config. Recommended usage: keep dispatch_strategy='online_eta' and only add a few overrides when necessary; the simulator will fill the rest online.

input_format.taxi_id: str - ID of the taxi to dispatch (must be idle)
input_format.reservation_ids: list[str] - List of reservation IDs to assign to this taxi

functions.usage_example:
```python
# Build a dispatch decision for the first idle taxi -> first waiting reservation
idle_taxis = taxi_fleet_state['idle_taxis']
reservations = pending_reservations['reservations']

dispatch_decisions = []
if idle_taxis and reservations:
    dispatch_decisions.append(dispatch_taxi(taxi_id=idle_taxis[0], reservation_ids=[reservations[0]['id']]))
```

functions.name: reposition_taxi
functions.description: Build a reposition override decision entry for taxi scheduling config. Recommended usage: set reposition_strategy='auto_taz_balance' (online), and optionally add a few overrides for special cases.

input_format.taxi_id: str - ID of the taxi to reposition (must be idle)
input_format.target_edge: Optional str - Edge ID where the taxi should go
input_format.target_taz: Optional str - TAZ ID where the taxi should go (system selects edge)

functions.usage_example:
```python
# Build a reposition decision for an idle taxi
idle_taxis = taxi_fleet_state['idle_taxis']
# Example: use the first configured high-demand edge if provided
high_demand_edge = (current_taxi_config.get('high_demand_zones') or [None])[0]

reposition_decisions = []
if idle_taxis and high_demand_edge:
    reposition_decisions.append(reposition_taxi(taxi_id=idle_taxis[0], target_edge=high_demand_edge))
```

functions.name: rank_idle_taxis_by_distance
functions.description: Rank idle taxis by Euclidean distance to a pending reservation pickup_position (requires pending_reservations[*].pickup_position). Returns the closest candidates for distance-based dispatch.

input_format.reservation_id: Optional str - Reservation ID (looks up in pending_reservations)
input_format.reservation: Optional dict - Reservation object from pending_reservations['reservations']
input_format.max_candidates: Optional int - Max number of candidates to return (default: 10)

functions.usage_example:
```python
# Choose nearest idle taxi by Euclidean distance
res = pending_reservations['reservations'][0]
candidates = rank_idle_taxis_by_distance(reservation=res, max_candidates=5)
if candidates:
    taxi_id = candidates[0]['taxi_id']
    dispatch_decisions = [dispatch_taxi(taxi_id=taxi_id, reservation_ids=[res['id']])]
```
